role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed silent in Phase 2.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and settlement patterns consistent with steppe environments.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (xeric grasses) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (dirt roads, utility poles, fencing styles).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (roof styles, camera artifacts) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Mongolia as the ground truth. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing high-quality, image-grounded evidence. The meta agent's identification of specific camera artifacts (Trekker rigs) was the decisive factor that allowed the judge to distinguish Mongolia from the visually similar Kazakhstan.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted the lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of the flat, arid steppe and wooden fences match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the sparse, low-lying vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the unpaved road and vertical slat fencing.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the specific camera blur artifacts visible in the image.
